tluaTypeGuardIdentity.tlua(11,11): error TLUA2322: Type 'string | number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
  Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
tluaTypeGuardIdentity.tlua(18,11): error TLUA2322: Type 'string | number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
  Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
tluaTypeGuardIdentity.tlua(26,11): error TLUA2322: Type 'string | number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
  Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
tluaTypeGuardIdentity.tlua(31,6): error TLUA2554: Expected 1 arguments, but got 0.
tluaTypeGuardIdentity.tlua(32,11): error TLUA2322: Type 'string | number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
  Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.


==== tluaTypeGuardIdentity.tlua (5 errors) ====
    // Only a call to the real global `type` narrows. The binder matches the call by
    // spelling, so every one of these shapes reaches the checker and is turned down
    // there; each unnarrowed use below is an error.
    
    declare v: string | number;
    declare function use(x: unknown): void;
    
    function shadowed(): void {
      local type = function(value: any) return "string"; end;
      if type(v) == "string" then
        local s: string = v;
              ~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'string | number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
      end
    }
    
    function aliased(): void {
      local t = type;
      if t(v) == "string" then
        local s: string = v;
              ~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'string | number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
      end
    }
    
    declare holder: { type: (value: any) => string };
    
    function member(): void {
      if holder.type(v) == "string" then
        local s: string = v;
              ~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'string | number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
      end
    }
    
    function wrongArity(): void {
      if type() == "string" then
         ~~~~
!!! error TLUA2554: Expected 1 arguments, but got 0.
!!! related TLUA6210 lib.luajit.d.tlua:207:23: An argument for 'value' was not provided.
        local s: string = v;
              ~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'string | number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.
      end
    }
    
    // The global still narrows in the same file, once the shadow is out of scope.
    function global(): void {
      if type(v) == "string" then
        local s: string = v;
        use(s);
      end
    }
